hero.subtitle: Fast distribution of generic and brand medicines and pharmaceutical products for pharmacies, clinics and hospitals across Angola.

services.title: Our Products
services.subtitle: We ensure efficient and safe medicine supply with fast distribution and certified quality across Angola.
services.urgentSubtitle: Fast delivery in Luanda in 2-3 hours. Contact us now!

generics.title: Generic Medicines
generics.description: Distribution of certified-quality generic medicines for pharmacies, clinics and hospitals.

brand.title: Brand Medicines
brand.description: Complete portfolio of brand medicines with guaranteed origin and quality.

delivery.title: Fast Distribution
delivery.description: Delivery in Luanda in 2-3 hours and nationwide distribution with efficient logistics.

cold.title: Controlled Cold Chain
cold.description: Strict temperature monitoring to guarantee medicine integrity.

warehouse.title: Own Warehouses
warehouse.description: Modern storage infrastructure with ideal conditions for all types of medicines.

quality.title: Quality Control
quality.description: Certified in Good Distribution Practices (GDP) with documented quality policy.

about.intro: Founded on September 26, 2024, JudiFarma is a pharmaceutical distributor dedicated to the efficient and safe supply of medicines, contributing to the health of the Angolan population.
about.missionText: Ensure efficient and safe medicine supply, contributing to the improvement of public health.
about.visionText: To be a benchmark pharmaceutical distributor in Angola, recognized for quality, trust and logistic efficiency.
about.coverageDesc: Distribution in Luanda and across the country
about.portfolioSub: We work with a wide range of pharmaceutical products to serve pharmacies, clinics and hospitals across Angola.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Request a quote or contact us. We are ready to serve pharmacies, clinics and hospitals across Angola.
contact.emailDesc: We reply as soon as possible
contact.formSub: Fill in the form and we will contact you.
contact.name: Name / Company
contact.requestPh: Describe the medicines or products you need...
contact.errorRequired: Please fill in at least the name and request description.
contact.hqAddr: Sanzala neighborhood, towards Viana Cemetery, before Sonangalp gas station
contact.urgentSub: Contact us on WhatsApp or call us directly to request a fast delivery.

footer.about: Benchmark pharmaceutical distributor in Angola, ensuring efficient and safe medicine supply.
footer.ctaSub: We serve pharmacies, clinics and hospitals
